description: Stage 14 hand-labelled gold set (T5 expansion to ~80 records).  Pairs (event, expected_extraction) for the StubExtractor's lookup map and the evaluation harness's truth source.  Stratified across the four most-common GB fuel types (Gas, Nuclear, Wind, Coal at minimum, plus Solar / Hydro / Pumped Storage / Biomass / Oil / Interconnector / Battery in smaller numbers) and the two main event types (Outage / Restriction), with a few synthesise-on-NULL probes (M-NA..M-ND) exercising the D6 OQ-B path and a missing-capacity probe (M-NM) exercising the extractor's graceful-default path.  M-A..M-K are the original T3 bootstrap entries; M-L..M-NM are the T5 curation extension.
